financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made more money than expected, which is a good sign.
They are in a strong position to pay off debts, which means they are financially healthy.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is doing well in managing risks, but there's a concern about keeping up growth if the industry doesn't improve.
They are spending more on expanding and digital tools, which they believe will settle down soon.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in managing its leadership and decision-making processes.
There is room for improvement in how the company handles social issues like community and employee relations.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke very positively about their financial success and future plans.
They confidently addressed questions and shared strong results, which made the overall tone very optimistic.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company's leaders answered questions but didn't give clear details or numbers.
Their answers were similar to past ones and didn't offer new information about future plans.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing very well, and its leaders are confident about their plans for future growth.
They are being careful about future predictions because of possible rule changes, but overall things look positive.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: SBI Life Insurance is doing well because it has grown its profits and assets, showing it can handle market changes.
The company is focusing on new products and customer needs, which helps it stay strong and grow in the long run.
